reviews.review_text: Managing staff are friendly and extremely helpful. They have worked hard to improve the standard of the park with excellent maintenance when a problem is reported. The grounds and amenities are clean and tidy.  Problem residents are dealt with to ensure a safe friendly park for all to enjoy. As a single female I have always safe living here.
Not a van park, cabins only.

Disgusting mangerment,  evict people that are good people
Rude neighbours that are know it all's
Never go there if I could give it 0 stars I would
